post.content: Yesterday, I had my first onsite interview round (the screening was already completed). Due to some confusion, I was 10 minutes late. The first question was similar to the "number of islands" problem, which I was able to solve and code successfully. However, the follow-up question was a multi-source BFS type problem, and I couldn\'t solve it. My second round of interviews is scheduled for Monday (both rounds were set up together). What are my chances for the next round?
How did you rounds go? Please share what was asked.
can you share the question asked in screning round?
don\'t wanna discourage..but unless u perform really good in the second round \nit will most likely be a no\nas uber is very strict in problem solving rounds
